system.description:
A Hermetic Sorcerer is a Magical Adept who follows the Hermetic tradition and specialises entirely in Sorcery. They can cast spells but cannot summon or bind Elementals. They follow all normal Hermetic rules for spellcasting and spell learning.

Magical Adepts have no access to astral space whatsoever — neither astral perception nor astral projection.

SR2E p.163
